title: Remove or justify blanket #![allow(dead_code)] in tui modules
description: All three tui modules (app.rs, ui.rs, event.rs) have blanket #![allow(dead_code)] at the module level. This hides actual dead code that should be removed or justified. Dead code markers (/* scaffolding for Phase 4x */) should be used instead, allowing the compiler to warn about actual unused functions and fields.
